titleStmt.title: SII 31.185: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 185. (A.R. No. B 205 of 1936.) BOGGARAM (NEAR MUPPĀḶḶA), VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar lying in the Guṟṟālamma temple.

This record contains two dates. The first is dated in Śaka 1323, Vṛisha Phālguṇa, śu. 15, Monday, corresponding to 1401 A.D. Feruary 28. While the second is dated in Śaka 1276 (wrong for Śaka 1259) Īśvara, Pushya, śu. 2, Thursday, corresponding to 1337 A.D. December 25, Thursday.

The first part of record refers to the assemblage of the trade-communities viz., paradēsi, chālumūla-vubhaya-nānādēśa-samaste pekkaṁḍru, eḍūnṭ siṁhālu, baniva jangali billmu nibbaru and billagumāḍlu (billa-kumārlu ?) in the mukhamaṇḍapa of the Śōmēśvara temple Nelikuduti i.e., Nelikuduru.

The second part of the inscription records the gift of the village Boggaramu as samaya-mānya and also the gift of a horse and an umbrella to the goddess Guṟṟāla Paramēśvari by these trade guilds. It also specifies the contributions by various communities in which billa gumāllu (billa-kumālu) and (yēḍnūṇṭ i simhyālu) are included, and also records the exemptions of the taxes payable and the articles purchased or sold at this place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbu
lu 1323 Agunēṁṭi vṛṣa
saṁvatsara phālluṇa śu 15 sō . Addhaṁ
ki koṁḍa śrīnarasiṁhyuni tiru
patiki vasaṁtamahōtyavamu koluvu
vaccina triśūladharuṁḍunu dripura
saṁhyaruṁḍunu lōkēśvaruṁḍununainaci(bē)
tāḷamaṇigaṇamulu mukhyamaina neliku
diṭi sōmēśvaradēvara śrīmukhamaṁḍapāna
vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai kū¨rccuṁnnadi va(pa)radē
śi cālumūlavubhayaṁ nānādēśa samastapekkaṁḍrunu
vīriparivāramunnu Eḍnūṭi śi(si)ṁhyaluṁnnu baliya
jaṁgili billamunibbarunnu billakumāḷlunnu vajrasiṁhya
sanārūḍhulai svastiśrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1277 yīśvara
saṁvatsara puṣya śu 2 gu . dha¨rmmasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai cālumū
la balusamaya cakrava¨rttulai sarilēni samayavārudhulai vilāsanī
paricitulaiyuṁḍi gītavādya nṛtyapariyatrayaṁba nelaya cu
ṁḍa sukhasaṁkhadāvinōdrāṁbuluṁboddu veccucu dēśālu tammaḷa pe
ṭṭi manniṁci gurramunnu goḍuguṁnnu beṭṭi guṟṟālaparamēśvarāliki boggara
mu samayamānyamugānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastāyigānu yiccina śāsanaṁ .
balijevāru Āsīmanu sa 2 kōmaṭiṁṭṭanu sa 2 peṟiki seṭlumūlavīsā
lu sālevāru maggāna sa 2 billagumāḷlu yēṁṭa sa 2 yēdunūṁṭī siṁ
hyāla yēṁṭa sa 1 gōnelu nēsēyiṁṭa sa 1 puṣpāla ciṁḍrika sa 2 mēdaṟa
yiṁṭa sa 2 cākalavāriyiṁṭa sa 2 maṁgaḷlavāri yiṁṭa sa 2 māla
ggāsa 2 mādigiṁṭi sa 2 yīdaṁḍḍu baṁḍibāniśa(sa) Eddu pāṁḍi pa
saramu guṟṟaṁ nuvvulu sahitamainarasabhaṁḍaṁbu sibaṁdālu
nnu Ēvevahāramāḍinānu Amminaṁgonnanu suṁkhaṁ(ka) sa¨rvvamānyaṁ
yī mānyamunnu yiṭṭē celliṁcēdi . celliṁpa nivāru gaṁggaka(ru)
ta kulagōvuṁjaṁpina pāpānaṁ cōvuvāru . tamapeddakoḍukuṁ
jaṁppi kapāḷānaṁ guḍuṁcni dōṣānaṁ bōvu vāru . celliṁci
Digital edition of SII 31.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
